description: Mark a server-stored KP as dead so the next getKeyPackages call for that DID will not select it. Underlying-KP equivalent of invalidateWelcome.

deviceDid.description: DID of the device whose KP is being invalidated.

keyPackageHash.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 hash of the KP to invalidate.

reason.description: Why the KP is being invalidated.

marked.description: True if the KP was just marked dead in this call.

alreadyDead.description: True if the KP was already dead before this call (idempotent).

errors.name: KeyPackageNotFound
errors.description: No KP exists for the given (deviceDid, keyPackageHash) pair.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: Caller is neither the KP owner nor a member of any convo where the failure was observed.
